Enlightenment is the theoretical state of permanent liberation from the [[Seven Plagues]].

It is considered the end goal in [[dharmic religions]] such as [[Buddhism]], [[Hinduism]], [[Jainism]], and [[Sikhism]].

Lifeism rejects the concept as a violation of the principle of [[impermanence]] and as a [[Hydroplane]] which causes [[Spiralling]]. In Buddhist language people develop [[attachments]] to the idea of enlightenment.
[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[sn:Enlightenment]][[sn:Enlightenment]][[Category:Maelstroms]]
[[Category:Buddhism]]
[[Category:Nobility]]
[[Category:Hinduism]]
[[Category:Jainism]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Enlightenment]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[sn:Enlightenment]]
[[Category:Pages]]
